EXPORT_NETWORK

NETWORK

df_clean_SCFA <- read.csv("df_clean_SCFA.csv")

df_clean_species <- read.csv("df_clean_species.csv")

df_clean_pathway <- read.csv("df_clean_pathway.csv")

df_clean_cell <- read.csv("df_clean_cell.csv")
df_SCFA_ready <- read.csv("df_SCFA_ready.csv")

df_species_ready <- read.csv("df_species_ready.csv")

df_pathway_ready <- read.csv("df_pathway_ready.csv")

df_cell_ready <- read.csv("df_cell_ready.csv")

df_all <- read.csv("df_all_raw.csv")

data_cor <- read.csv("data_cor_spearman_46baby.csv")

names(data_cor) <- c("Var1", "Var2", "cor",   "p", "FDR")

length(unique( c(data_cor$Var1, data_cor$Var2) ))
## [1] 269
dim(data_cor)
## [1] 5366    5
data_cor_clean <- data_cor

data_cor_clean <- as.data.frame(data_cor_clean)
data_butyric <- data_cor_clean |> subset(Var1 == "butyrate" | Var2 == "butyrate")
data_butyric
##                                                                 Var1
## 895                                                         butyrate
## 3655  PWY.6895..superpathway.of.thiamine.diphosphate.biosynthesis.II
## 3665                               PWY.7783..plasmalogen.degradation
## 4483                                 PWY5F9.12..biphenyl.degradation
## 5084              PWY.5505..L.glutamate.and.L.glutamine.biosynthesis
## 5123 THISYN.PWY..superpathway.of.thiamine.diphosphate.biosynthesis.I
##             Var2        cor            p          FDR
## 895  isobutyrate  0.6077706 7.480467e-06 0.0002986002
## 3655    butyrate -0.4175231 4.322380e-03 0.0422397202
## 3665    butyrate  0.5221675 4.368439e-03 0.0425830435
## 4483    butyrate  0.7454545 8.454729e-03 0.0673325110
## 5084    butyrate  0.4284759 1.285336e-02 0.0903224429
## 5123    butyrate -0.3667984 1.319820e-02 0.0920395952
# data_cor_clean <- data_cor |> subset((cor > 0.05 | cor < -0.05) )

data_cor_clean$Var1 <- as.character(data_cor_clean$Var1)
data_cor_clean$Var2 <- as.character(data_cor_clean$Var2)
# data_cor_clean <- data_cor

data_cor_clean[ , 1:3] -> links

names(links) <- c("source", "target", "importance")
unique_all_col <- c(data_cor_clean$Var1, data_cor_clean$Var2)

unique_all_col <- as.character(unique_all_col)

unique_all_col <- unique(unique_all_col)

unique_all_col %in% names(df_all)
##   [1] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
##  [16] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
##  [31] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
##  [46] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
##  [61] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
##  [76] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
##  [91] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [106] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [121] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [136] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [151] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [166] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [181] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [196] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [211] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [226] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [241] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
## [256] TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE TRUE
data_node <- data.frame(node = unique_all_col,
                        type = NA)

data_node$type[which(data_node$node %in% names(df_SCFA_ready))] <- "SCFA"

data_node$type[which(data_node$node %in% names(df_species_ready))] <- "species"

data_node$type[which(data_node$node %in% names(df_pathway_ready))] <- "pathway"

data_node$type[which(data_node$node %in% names(df_cell_ready))] <- "cell"

data_node[ , ]  -> nodes

names(nodes) <- c("name", "carac")
# setdiff(links$source, links$target)
# 
# setdiff(links$target, links$source)

nodes[which(nodes$name %in% union(links$target, links$source)), ] -> nodes

nodes |> dplyr:::arrange(carac) -> nodes
# head(df_clean_SCFA)
# head(df_clean_species)
# head(df_clean_pathway)


df_clean_pathway <- df_clean_pathway |> subset(metadata == "Termness")

df_clean_species <- df_clean_species |> subset(metadata == "Termness")

df_clean_SCFA <- df_clean_SCFA |> subset(metadata == "Termness")

df_clean_cell <- df_clean_cell |> subset(metadata == "Termness")

df_coef_master <- rbind(df_clean_SCFA[ , c(1,5)],
                        df_clean_cell[ , c(1,5)],
                        df_clean_pathway[ , c(1,5)],
                        df_clean_species[ , c(1,5)]
                     
                        )


names(df_coef_master) <- c("name", "coef")

setdiff(df_coef_master$name, nodes$name)
##  [1] "AEROBACTINSYN.PWY..aerobactin.biosynthesis"                          
##  [2] "DHGLUCONATE.PYR.CAT.PWY..glucose.degradation..oxidative."            
##  [3] "PWY.181..photorespiration"                                           
##  [4] "PWY.4361..S.methyl.5.thio..alpha..D.ribose.1.phosphate.degradation.I"
##  [5] "PWY.5392..reductive.TCA.cycle.II"                                    
##  [6] "PWY.6435..4.hydroxybenzoate.biosynthesis.III..plants."               
##  [7] "PWY.6920..6.gingerol.analog.biosynthesis..engineered."               
##  [8] "PWY66.367..ketogenesis"                                              
##  [9] "UDPNACETYLGALSYN.PWY..UDP.N.acetyl.D.glucosamine.biosynthesis.II"    
## [10] "X12DICHLORETHDEG.PWY..1.2.dichloroethane.degradation"                
## [11] "Haemophilus_haemolyticus.t__SGB9649"                                 
## [12] "Haemophilus_parainfluenzae.t__SGB9657"                               
## [13] "Scardovia_wiggsiae.t__SGB15494"                                      
## [14] "Staphylococcus_haemolyticus.t__SGB7861"                              
## [15] "Veillonella_atypica.t__SGB6936"
setdiff(nodes$name, df_coef_master$name)
## character(0)
nodes_merge <- merge(x = nodes,
                     y = df_coef_master,
                     all.x = T,
                     by = "name")

nodes_merge$name <- as.character(nodes_merge$name)

nodes_merge |> dplyr:::arrange(carac) -> nodes_merge

nodes_merge$term_col <- ifelse(nodes_merge$coef >= 0,
                           "preterm",
                           "term")
library(igraph)
## Warning: package 'igraph' was built under R version 4.5.3
## 
## Attaching package: 'igraph'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     decompose, spectrum
## The following object is masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     union
# Turn it into igraph object
network <- graph_from_data_frame(d=links, 
                                 vertices=nodes,
                                 directed = T) 

deg <- degree(network, mode="all")

summary(deg)
##    Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
##     1.0    15.0    37.0    39.9    60.0   102.0
# deg <- sqrt(deg)
# 
# deg + 0.1 -> deg

df_deg <- as.data.frame(deg)
unclass(V(network)) -> vec_chuan

names(vec_chuan) -> order_vec_chuan
nodes_merge <- nodes_merge[  order(match(nodes_merge$name, order_vec_chuan)) ,  ]

identical(order_vec_chuan, nodes_merge$name)
## [1] TRUE
setdiff(order_vec_chuan,
        nodes_merge$name)
## character(0)
setdiff(nodes_merge$name,
        order_vec_chuan)
## character(0)
# sort(table(nodes_merge$name), decreasing = T)
V(network)$carac
##   [1] "SCFA"    "SCFA"    "SCFA"    "SCFA"    "cell"    "cell"    "cell"   
##   [8] "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway"
##  [15] "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway"
##  [22] "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway" "pathway"

CHUAN FORMAT NETWORK

df_deg$name <- row.names(df_deg)

row.names(df_deg) <- NULL
links

write.csv(links, "links_all_46baby.csv", row.names = F, quote = F)



nodes_merge |> dplyr:::arrange(name) -> nodes_merge

df_deg |> dplyr:::arrange(name) -> df_deg

identical(df_deg$name, nodes_merge$name)
## [1] TRUE
nodes_merge_ok <- cbind(nodes_merge, df_deg[ , 1])

# options(max.print = 1e9)

names(nodes_merge_ok)[5] <- "deg"
write.csv(nodes_merge_ok, "nodes_merge_all_46baby.csv", row.names = F,  quote = F)

NODE:

1/ FILL: TÔ MÀU NODE THEO COEF MAASLIN:

COEF > 0: PRETERM: màu tím

COEF < 0: TERM: màu xanh lá

2/ SHAPE:

SCFA: tam giác

PATHWAY: vuông

SPECIES: tròn

3/ Text label: màu đen

EDGE:

1/ Line color:

cor > 0: red

cor < 0: blue

LAYOUT:

sắp xếp sao cho ra thành từng cụm, đạt yêu cầu thẩm mỹ, khoa học

  1. Cytoscape: https://cytoscape.org/

  2. D3.js: https://d3js.org/

  3. Palladio: https://hdlab.stanford.edu/palladio/

  4. Nodegoat: https://nodegoat.net/
